schema_notes: Each query has split=tune|holdout. Negatives prefixed near- are deliberate near-miss false-positive traps: they share surface vocabulary with positive triggers but should not load the skill. See docs/hillclimb-improvements.md.

queries.query: Can you rewrite this README intro so it doesn't sound like generic AI copy?
This article ending feels true but flat. Help me make the conclusion more concrete.
Tighten these product slides and remove the marketing fog.
Polish this launch email, but keep it specific and not ChatGPT-ish.
Review this LinkedIn post for AI-writing tells before I publish it.
This wiki page has a lot of 'important to note' filler. Can you clean it up?
Make this video script sound less like a safe essay and more grounded in examples.
The paragraphs are individually clear, but the section reads like a list. Fix the flow.
Review this DevRel blog draft for vague claims and missing runnable evidence.
Can you replace the 'not just X but Y' line in this landing-page copy with something sharper?
Refactor this Python module to reduce duplication and add type hints.
Write unit tests for this retry helper and cover the timeout edge case.
Load sales.csv and make a bar chart of revenue by month.
Fix typos and comma mistakes in this paragraph without changing the wording.
Summarize this API documentation into a list of endpoints and parameters.
My GitHub Actions workflow fails on npm install. Debug the YAML.
Optimize this SQL query and explain the query plan.
Convert this JSON file to YAML and preserve all keys.
Create a CSS grid layout for a responsive dashboard.
Translate this Spanish paragraph to English as literally as possible.
Fact-check this blog post and tell me which claims aren't sourced.
Check that every link in this README still resolves and update the broken ones.
Draft a project status email from these bullet points for me to send tomorrow.
Break this video script into storyboard scenes with shot directions.
Export these slides to PDF and rename them with today's date.
Generate a docx report from this dataset and email it to the team.
